prompt: A pixel-perfect macOS application window mockup for a 'Collections' view of an AI image viewer called 'ImageView'. Background #08080c. All monospace text. TOP BAR: traffic lights, centered tabs with 'grid' having green underline. The sidebar is visible (220px, #0c0c12 background). LEFT SIDEBAR shows: 'COLLECTIONS' header in tiny uppercase gray, then a list: '▾ Hero Images (12)' highlighted in blue, '  Brand Icons (48)', '  Landscapes Best (23)'. Below: 'EXPORT' section with 'preset: web-ready' and a green button '▸ Export Collection'. MAIN AREA: a reorderable grid of 12 curated AI portrait images. Each image has a small index number in the top-left corner (01, 02, 03...) in monospace green text. One image is being dragged — it's slightly elevated with a subtle shadow, and a green insertion indicator line shows where it will drop. The images are high-quality diverse portraits. BOTTOM STATUS BAR: 'COLLECTION: Hero Images | 12 images | drag to reorder | [⌘E] export'. Terminal aesthetic, monospace, dark theme.
